texto: Don't be a pepper on the eyes of people
autor: Rather be the salt on their tongue and make a difference that influences their sense of belonging to the earth.
explicacao: Citação de Rather be the salt on their tongue and make a difference that influences their sense of belonging to the earth. sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “Don't be a pepper on the eyes of people” articula reflexao, israelmore-ayivor, pepper em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
